summary: Agent2 recommends using a case-control study due to its ability to compare smokers versus nonsmokers amongst people diagnosed with or free from lung cancer respectively; this method offers swift assessment needed when exploring potential causal links promptly after disease diagnosis becomes evident. \boxed{\text{Case-Control Study}} This approach contrasts sharply yet effectively complements traditional prospective methods through leveraging pre-existing conditions data rather than waiting years until outcomes manifest fully within populations exposed over extended periods under observation protocols alone might take too much longer initially while still providing robust insights necessary early-on during investigative phases concerning public health concerns linked
